message:
fix: resolve build errors after parallel agent changes

- Fix PatternSuggestion import in hook.rs (use crate::packs instead of evaluator)
- Add pattern_suggestions parameter to output_denial and print_colorful_warning
- Add agents field to Config struct and generate_default()
- Add suggestions field to PatternMatch initializers
- Add branch_context field to EvaluationResult initializers
- Fix type mismatch in apply_branch_strictness for branch checks
- Add branch strictness tests

These changes are needed to make the build pass after other agents
introduced new required struct fields (AgentsConfig, PatternSuggestion,
branch_context).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
